title: Print Hello World
code: print('Hello, World!')

title: Input Example
code:
num = input('Enter a number: ')
print('You entered:', num)

title: Add Two Numbers
code:
a = int(input('Enter first number: '))
b = int(input('Enter second number: '))
print('Sum =', a + b)
output:
Enter first number: 5
Enter second number: 3
Sum = 8

title: Subtract Two Numbers
code:
a = int(input())
b = int(input())
print('Subtraction =', a - b)

title: Multiply Two Numbers
code:
a = int(input())
b = int(input())
print('Product =', a * b)

title: Square Root of a Number
code:
import math
n = int(input())
print('Square Root:', math.sqrt(n))

title: Check Positive Number
Even or Odd
Largest of Two Numbers
code:
a = int(input())
b = int(input())
print(max(a, b))

title: Simple Calculator
code:
a = int(input())
b = int(input())
print('Sum:', a+b)
print('Sub:', a-b)
print('Mul:', a*b)
print('Div:', a/b)

title: Area of Circle
code:
r = float(input())
area = 3.14 * r * r
print('Area =', area)

title: Swap Two Numbers
code:
a = int(input())
b = int(input())
a, b = b, a
print(a, b)

title: AND Operator Example
OR Operator Example
NOT Operator Example
Prefix, Postfix (Python Behavior)
code:
a = 10
print('Prefix-like:', a+1)
print('Postfix-like:', a)
a += 1
print('Actual a:', a)

title: Bitwise Operators
code:
a, b = 3, 6
print(a & b)
print(a | b)
print(a ^ b)
print(~a)
print(a << 2)
print(b >> 1)

title: Check Voting Eligibility
Factorial of a Number
code:
n = int(input())
f = 1
for i in range(1, n+1):
    f *= i
print(f)

title: Sum of First N Numbers
code:
n = int(input())
print(sum(range(n+1)))

title: Print Numbers 1 to 10
code:
for i in range(1, 11):
    print(i)

title: Reverse a Number
code:
n = input()
print(n[::-1])

title: Palindrome String
Fibonacci Series
code:
a, b = 0, 1
n = int(input())
for _ in range(n):
    print(a, end=' ')
    a, b = b, a+b

title: Check Prime Number
code:
n = int(input())
flag = True
for i in range(2, n):
    if n % i == 0:
        flag = False
        break
print('Prime' if flag else 'Not Prime')

title: Check Leap Year
Count Digits in a Number
code:
n = input()
print('Digits:', len(n))

title: Sum of Digits
code:
n = input()
sum_digits = sum(int(i) for i in n)
print(sum_digits)

title: Find Minimum in a List
code:
lst = [5, 2, 9, 1]
print(min(lst))

title: Find Maximum in a List
code:
lst = [5, 2, 9, 1]
print(max(lst))

title: Sort a List
code:
lst = [4, 1, 3, 2]
lst.sort()
print(lst)

title: Reverse a List
code:
lst = [1, 2, 3]
lst.reverse()
print(lst)

title: Check Element in List
code:
lst = [1, 2, 3, 4]
x = 3
print(x in lst)

title: List Comprehension Example
code:
squares = [x*x for x in range(5)]
print(squares)

title: Loop Through Dictionary
Function Example
Function With Default Argument
Lambda Function
code:
f = lambda x: x*x
print(f(5))

title: Map Function
code:
nums = [1, 2, 3]
sq = list(map(lambda x: x*x, nums))
print(sq)

title: Filter Even Numbers
code:
nums = [1, 2, 3, 4]
ev = list(filter(lambda x: x%2==0, nums))
print(ev)

title: Reduce Function
code:
from functools import reduce
nums = [1, 2, 3]
res = reduce(lambda a,b: a+b, nums)
print(res)

title: Class and Object
Constructor Example
Class With Attributes
Inheritance Example
File Write Example
code:
f = open('demo.txt', 'w')
f.write('Hello File')
f.close()

title: File Read Example
code:
f = open('demo.txt', 'r')
print(f.read())

title: Try Except Example
Random Number Generate
code:
import random
print(random.randint(1,10))

title: Sum of List Items
code:
lst = [1,2,3,4]
print(sum(lst))

title: Check Armstrong Number
code:
n = input()
s = sum(int(i)**3 for i in n)
print('Armstrong' if s == int(n) else 'Not Armstrong')

title: Count Vowels
code:
s = input()
v = 'aeiouAEIOU'
count = sum(1 for i in s if i in v)
print(count)

title: Remove Duplicates From List
code:
lst = [1,2,2,3,3,4]
print(list(set(lst)))

title: Sum of First N Natural Numbers #1
code:
n = int(input("Enter N: "))
total = n * (n + 1) // 2
print("Sum =", total)

title: Multiplication Table of a Number #1
Check Positive, Negative or Zero #1
Largest of Three Numbers #1
code:
a = float(input("Enter first: "))
b = float(input("Enter second: "))
c = float(input("Enter third: "))
largest = a
if b > largest:
    largest = b
if c > largest:
    largest = c
print("Largest =", largest)
